info.name: Stables-HT-ISS-time-daily-5
info.description:
STABLECOIN4: Extended to 45 days. Requires Java Option B (maturityDate filter).
maturityDate filter is a NO-OP for ISS (all monitoring times within contract lifecycle).

ISSUER PERSPECTIVE fix2: DERIVED PORTFOLIO INDEXES
═════════════════════════════════════════════════

FIX vs fix1:
  fix1: SC_CASH_RESERVE, SC_TOTAL_RESERVES, SC_BACKING_RATIO, SC_WAM_DAYS,
        SC_BUCKET_* were all HARDCODED Reference Indexes.
  fix2: Phase 0 runs 5 asset contracts through ACTUS FIRST.
        DERIVES 10 indexes from actual MD events:
        - Cash (initial + T-bill maturity proceeds)
        - Total reserves (cash + surviving T-bill MtM)
        - Backing ratio (reserves / supply)
        - WAM (weighted average maturity from T-bill dates)
        - Bucket shares (concentration per tenor bucket)
        - HQLA score (100 = all L1)
        - Attestation age (days since epoch start)

MARKET DATA (correctly hardcoded — external signals):
  PEG_DEV, PEG_RISK, CURVE, ORDERBOOK, CEX, SENTIMENT,
  BANK_STRESS, SOVEREIGN_STRESS, 6x CA risk signals

6 BEHAVIORAL MODELS (2 ENHANCED) x 45 DAILY EPOCHS
6 PAM CONTRACTS (5 assets + 1 liability)
ZERO CODE CHANGES. Collection JSON only.

Open Postman Console (Ctrl+Alt+C) before running.

MARKET DATA NORMALIZATION & CALIBRATION
════════════════════════════════════════

BANK_STRESS_INDEX [0,1]:
  Source: OFR Financial Stress Index (33 daily variables)
  URL: https://www.financialresearch.gov/financial-stress-index/
  Normalization: clamp((OFR_FSI + 2) / 12, 0, 1)
    0.0 = calm (OFR -2), 0.17 = normal (OFR 0), 0.50 = severe (OFR +4)
  Sim baseline: 0.10 ≈ OFR -0.8 (normal)
  Sim peak: 0.55 ≈ OFR +4.6 (moderate-severe, between SVB and COVID)
  Threshold 0.5: quality degrades above OFR +4.0 (severe banking stress)
  Alt sources: STLFSI4 (FRED), KCFSI (Kansas City Fed)

US_SOVEREIGN_STRESS [0,1]:
  Source: US 5-Year CDS Spread (Bloomberg/ICE/Markit)
  Normalization: clamp(CDS_bps / 200, 0, 1)
    0.0 = 0bps, 0.15 = 30bps (normal), 0.50 = 100bps, 0.875 = 175bps
  Sim peak: 0.14 ≈ 28bps (normal-range sovereign, bank-driven crisis scenario)
  Narrative: banks are failing but U.S. government itself is fine
  Alt source: MOVE Index (ICE/BofA bond volatility)

STABLECOIN_PEG_DEV [0,1]:
  Source: DEX TWAP / Chainlink Price Feed / CoinGecko
  Direct observation: |market_price - $1.00|
  Sim peak: 0.042 = 4.2% deviation (moderate, 74th percentile of 609 events)
  Calibration: Lyons & Viswanath-Natraj (2023), 609 de-peg events
    Minor 1-3%: 412 events (68%), Moderate 3-10%: 156 events (26%)
    Severe 10-25%: 31 events (5%), Catastrophic >25%: 10 events (1.6%)

PEG_RISK_SCORE [0-100]:
  Composite: weighted sum of peg deviation, EW signals, market microstructure
  Sim peak: 48 (Mar 12) — high stress, triggers EMERGENCY_LIQUIDATION at ≥45

EARLY WARNING SIGNALS (4 validated signals from 609-event dataset):
  SC_CURVE_IMBALANCE [0,1]: DEX pool ratio. Threshold >0.15. F1=0.80, lead=4.2h
  SC_ORDERBOOK_DECLINE [0,1]: CEX depth. Threshold >0.40. F1=0.70, lead=2.1h
  SC_CEX_OUTFLOW_MULT [1,∞): Exchange outflows vs baseline. Threshold >3x. F1=0.69, lead=6.8h
  SC_SENTIMENT_ZSCORE [-∞,+∞]: NLP z-score. Threshold <-2.0. F1=0.63, lead=8.4h

REGULATORY THRESHOLDS:
  backingThreshold=1.0:       GENIUS Act §4(a)(1), STABLE Act §3
  liquidityThreshold=0.2:     Basel III LCR adapted (note: MiCA Art.54 uses 0.30)
  wamMaxDays=93:              GENIUS Act §4(a)(1)(A)(iii)
  hqlaMinScore=100:           GENIUS Act permitted assets (all L1 HQLA)
  qualityFloor=50:            Basel III HQLA L2B classification
  attestationMaxDays=30:      MiCA Art.54 monthly attestation cycle
  maxSingleAssetShare=0.40:   Prudential concentration (SVB lesson)
  hhiWarningThreshold=0.35:   Adapted from DoJ/FTC HHI guidelines (>0.25=concentrated)
  bankStressThreshold=0.5:    ≈ OFR FSI +4.0 (COVID-level banking stress)
  pegDeviationThreshold=0.005: Lower bound of minor de-peg events (609-event dataset)
  sovereignMaxDegradation=0.30: Cap on sovereign-driven quality loss (T-bills remain L2B minimum)

RESEARCH REFERENCES:
  Lyons & Viswanath-Natraj (2023): 609 de-peg event redemption curves
  Fed FEDS Notes Dec 2025: "In the Shadow of Bank Runs" (SVB/USDC analysis)
  BIS Working Paper 1164: "Public Information and Stablecoin Runs"
  OFR Working Paper (2019): "The OFR Financial Stress Index"
  Sanhaji (2024): "Collapse of SVB and USDC Depegging" (MDPI FinTech)
  GENIUS Act S.919: §4(a)(1) reserve requirements
  MiCA Regulation (EU) 2023/1114: Art.54 EMT requirements
  Basel III LCR: HQLA classification (L1/L2A/L2B)

FIX1 (2026-03-10): VERIFIED CLEAN — no /behaviorStateAt calls.
  This collection uses rf2/scenarioSimulation on 8083 which internally
  activates the scenario via /scenarioSimulationStart. No change needed.

VERSION 5 ENHANCEMENTS:
══════════════════════
  Enhanced existing models with new parameters (BACKWARD COMPATIBLE):

  1. AssetQualityModel (aq_iss_01) + STRICT MODE:
     • strictMode: true (GENIUS Act §4(a)(1) enforcement)
     • hqlaMOC: 'SC_HQLA_SCORE' (reads published HQLA index)
     • Enforces 100% L1 HQLA requirement with zero tolerance
     • Returns max degradation (1.0) if HQLA < 100

  2. ConcentrationDriftModel (cd_iss_01) + CUSTODIAN TRACKING:
     • custodianBucketMOCs: [] (optional - not used in this sim)
     • Enables SVB-style custodian concentration monitoring
     • When provided, tracks bank-level concentration separately

  NO new model types added - these are parameter enhancements to existing models
  that are fully backward compatible (defaults to original behavior if not set)

exec: console.log('PHASE 0: ISS Asset-Only ACTUS Run \u2014 Derive portfolio state');
console.log('\u2705 sc_iss_asset_only: 5 asset contracts, no behavioral models');});

item.name: 0.3 Run 5 asset contracts — derive 10 portfolio indexes

exec: pm.test('Derive ISS portfolio indexes from ACTUS events', function(){
console.log('\u2501 PHASE 0.3: Extracting ACTUS events from 5 ISS asset contracts');
'ISS-TBill-4W-001':   { notional: 25000, purchasePrice: 24800, iedDate: '2026-02-15', maturity: '2026-03-15', type: 'tbill', tenor: '4w' },
'ISS-TBill-8W-001':   { notional: 25000, purchasePrice: 24720, iedDate: '2026-02-01', maturity: '2026-03-30', type: 'tbill', tenor: '8w' },
'ISS-TBill-13W-001':  { notional: 25000, purchasePrice: 24650, iedDate: '2026-01-15', maturity: '2026-04-15', type: 'tbill', tenor: '13w' },
'ISS-TBill-26W-001':  { notional: 23000, purchasePrice: 22540, iedDate: '2025-12-15', maturity: '2026-06-15', type: 'tbill', tenor: '26w' }
console.log('  \u2705 ACTUS MD: ' + key + ' matures ' + e.time.substring(0,10));
// Group 4w+8w as short-term, 13w as medium, 26w as long
// HQLA: 100 (all assets are L1 — US T-bills + FDIC-insured cash)
// Attestation age: days since Mar 1 (30-day cycle, resets at 30)
console.log('  \u2501 DERIVED ISS PORTFOLIO STATE (10 indexes from ACTUS events):');

console.log('  Buckets (Mar 1): cash=' + (bucketCash[0].value*100).toFixed(1) + '% short=' + (bucket4w[0].value*100).toFixed(1) + '% med=' + (bucket13w[0].value*100).toFixed(1) + '% long=' + (bucket26w[0].value*100).toFixed(1) + '%');
console.log('  HQLA: 100 (all L1: US T-bills + FDIC cash)');
// Register all 10 derived indexes via pm.sendRequest()
console.error('\u274c Missing derived data for ' + idx.moc + ' (key: ' + idx.varKey + ')');
var body = { riskFactorID: idx.rfid, marketObjectCode: idx.moc, base: 1.0, data: JSON.parse(rawData) };
if(err) console.error('\u274c ' + idx.moc + ' registration failed: ' + err);
else console.log('\u2705 ' + idx.rfid + ': ' + idx.moc + ' DERIVED (' + body.data.length + ' points)');
if(registered === derivedIndexes.length) console.log('  \u2501 All ' + registered + ' derived indexes registered');
console.log('\u2705 ISS_EWRISK_01: CA signal: early warning (scenario)');});
console.log('\u2705 br_iss_01: BackingRatioModel (reads DERIVED reserves + cash)');});
console.log('\u2705 aq_iss_01: AssetQualityModel (reads market: bank+sovereign stress)');});
console.log('\u2705 cd_iss_01: ConcentrationDriftModel (reads DERIVED bucket shares)');});
console.log('\u2705 sc_iss_ht_daily_01: 24 RI (10 DERIVED + 14 market/scenario) + 6 BH = 30 descriptors');});

console.log('  10 indexes DERIVED from ACTUS T-bill events (not hardcoded)');
if(pps.length>12) console.log('    ... and '+(pps.length-12)+' more PP events');
pm.test('Liability has 186 PP events (6 models x 31 days)', function(){
